baselines.name: no_mitigation
baselines.description: No response to slow faults (lower bound)

baselines.name: fixed_speculation
baselines.description: Always speculate, never shed or isolate

baselines.name: fixed_shedding
baselines.description: Always shed load, never speculate or isolate

baselines.name: lit_blacklist
baselines.description: Outlier blacklisting (Cassandra dynamic snitch style), k=2.0

baselines.name: lit_retry
baselines.description: Timeout retry, deadline=SLO/2 then retry on another node
